text: The system shall share the same search bar for both Torrent and Video Stream searches.
The system shall update the database of torrent sites via the internet.
The system shall provide a tick box to include torrent searching in the search process.
The system shall retrieve the number of seeds, number of peers, file size, date posted, and a webpage link for torrent queries.
The system shall display the message "No results were found for this search" if no results are found.
The system shall arrange results in size, date, or alphabetical order when the user clicks on column headers.
The system shall provide a page button for result navigation.
The system shall update the database of video hosting and video linking sites via the internet.
The system shall provide a tick box to include video host searching in the search process.
The system shall provide a tick box to include video link searching in the search process.
The system shall retrieve the full video name, length, date posted, and a video link for video hosting site queries.
The system shall retrieve the show name, episode name, and webpage link for video link site queries.
The system shall remove unselected websites from the results when a user filters websites.
The system shall use hyperlinks to open websites in the user's default web browser.
The system shall complete a query to any website within 5 seconds.
The system shall send a hyperlink to the default browser in less than 1 second.
The system shall load the program in less than 10 seconds.
The system shall not display any torrent result with 0 seeds.
The system shall sort results in less than 0.1 seconds.
The system shall display 100 results per results page.
The system shall not display any torrent result with a rating of less than 1.
The system shall provide a filter option for parental controls to exclude explicit content.
The system shall provide a favorites option to store links to videos.
The system must be portable across Microsoft XP, Vista, Mac OS X, and Linux platforms.
The system must be compatible with Internet Explorer, Firefox, and Safari web browsers.
